rows.label: qev010902_MSG0001
rows.name:
H-Hey! I get back from my
mission, and Carl is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the sequence of events to Trevor.

rows.label: qev010902_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about Trevor and Carl's relationship.

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0003
rows.name:
I used to pass jobs his way a lot. He was
a good-for-nothing, but I thought he had
a diamond in the rough deep down...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0004
rows.name: Damn it...! So why... why did this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Eh? The monster brats you
spared on a previous mission
came back and killed him...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0006
rows.name:
And you went and took down
those ungrateful beasts...
Well... thank you for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0007
rows.name:
...But still. To think his dying
wish was for you to protect NLA
instead of worrying about himself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010902_MSG0008
rows.name:
That bastard Carl... making a request
that's so unlike him. Here's a reward. As
his senior, let me at least do this much.[ST:wait ]
